description: Composition Full length black track pants made of 100% polyester and engineered with ClimaCool technology with mesh lining, has adidas 3-Stripes running down the length of legs, doggle straps at the hem, welt pockets at the sides, elastic waist with drawcord and printed logo on the left thigh Fit Comfort Wash care Wash in less than 30 degree Do not soak, tumble dry or bleach Dry flat in shade Cool iron These adidas track pants are designed to add comfort and style while you focus on your performance. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these track pants keep you comfortably cool. The doggle straps at the bottom along with the zipper allow you to adjust the pant length, customising your comfort level, while the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snug. The stripes on the sides provide free and flexible movement and the drawstrings on the inside help you customise the fit. Fill the deep side pockets with your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. Pair it with a ClimaCool T-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance. Model statistics The product is of length 41" on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
